input_text: Elephants have long trunks and short tails. Mike is nice. Gertrude is a wolf. Tallinn is in Estonia. A chocolate cake fell. The woman holding a heavy lamp sang. "Riga is not in America. Apparently, Tom left early. Sheep are afraid of mice. The cat sat on the mat and purred. Americans can not disappear. The city was destroyed. The book was read by Sara. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. The tree was cut by the farmer. Clinton defeated Dole. The window was broken. The student who passed the test studied a lot. The red car is in the house. John likes some boxers. Mary, a pilot, smiled. If X1 is not a parent of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. Mark is not in the box. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. Sandra travelled to the office. Unexpectedly, the door opened. The room was cleaned. Nile's length is 80 kilometers. Sue is a true patriot. The letter was written in June. Any person is male or female. The picture was painted by Leo. A village road was narrow. Did the student fail the test?
